---
title: "Journal Reading"
subtitle: "Cardiology Teaching Materials & Literature Reviews"
author: "謝慕揚 MD, PhD, FESC (Drake Hsieh)"
date: last-modified
---

## 關於本站

本站收錄新竹臺大分院心血管中心的教學講義、文獻回顧，以及出國進修報告。

## 目錄

### Cardiology 心臟科

| # | 主題 | Topic |
|---|------|-------|
| 01 | [缺血性心臟病](handouts/01-ischemic-heart-disease/index.qmd) | Ischemic Heart Disease |
| 02 | [心衰竭](handouts/02-heart-failure/index.qmd) | Heart Failure |
| 03 | [心律不整](handouts/03-arrhythmia/index.qmd) | Arrhythmia |
| 04 | [瓣膜疾病](handouts/04-valvular-disease/index.qmd) | Valvular Disease |
| 05 | [心臟影像](handouts/05-cardiac-imaging/index.qmd) | Cardiac Imaging |
| 06 | [介入心臟學](handouts/06-interventional-cardiology/index.qmd) | Interventional Cardiology |
| 07 | [周邊血管](handouts/07-peripheral-vascular/index.qmd) | Peripheral Vascular |

### Specialized 專科

| # | 主題 | Topic |
|---|------|-------|
| 08 | [基因醫學](handouts/08-genetic-medicine/index.qmd) | Genetic Medicine |
| 09 | [高血壓](handouts/09-hypertension/index.qmd) | Hypertension |

### Critical Care 重症醫學

| # | 主題 | Topic |
|---|------|-------|
| 10 | [ICU 一般照護](handouts/10-icu-general/index.qmd) | ICU General Care |
| 11 | [ICU 呼吸系統](handouts/11-icu-respiratory/index.qmd) | ICU Respiratory |
| 12 | [ICU 血液動力學](handouts/12-icu-hemodynamics/index.qmd) | ICU Hemodynamics |
| 13 | [ICU 腎臟](handouts/13-icu-renal/index.qmd) | ICU Renal |

### Pulmonology 胸腔

| # | 主題 | Topic |
|---|------|-------|
| 20 | [肺栓塞](handouts/20-pulmonary-embolism/index.qmd) | Pulmonary Embolism |
| 21 | [肺高壓](handouts/21-pulmonary-hypertension/index.qmd) | Pulmonary Hypertension |
| 22 | [COPD/氣喘](handouts/22-copd-asthma/index.qmd) | COPD & Asthma |

### Other 其他

| # | 主題 | Topic |
|---|------|-------|
| 90 | [AI 科技](handouts/90-ai-technology/index.qmd) | AI & Technology |
| 91 | [Podcast 期刊回顧](handouts/91-podcast-journal-review/index.qmd) | Journal Podcast Reviews |
| 99 | [其他](handouts/99-misc/index.qmd) | Miscellaneous |

---

### Special Reports 特別報告

- [Mainz 2024 出國進修報告 — TAVI & TEER](handouts/04-valvular-disease/mainz-2024/quarto/zh/index.qmd)
